title: A Winter Battle and a Coach's Spirit
article_text: It is obvious that our district will host a big winter battle this year. The host will prepare a pool for the teams to jump into after the fight. Our coach says we must use a weapon during the battle, but it is a relatively safe tradition. The actual spirit of the event is to award cash to the winner. I hardly have any cash, so I hope to win the prize. The coach helps us settle our plans and gives aid to every fan. A broad boat will carry us to the battle area. After the lunch break, we will tire ourselves in the spring pool. The award ceremony has a tradition of giving a special prize to the best fighter. I will jump with joy if my team wins the battle.

sentences.en: It is obvious that our district will host a big winter battle this year.
sentences.zh: 很明显，我们区今年将举办一场大型冬季战役。

words.eng_def: an area of a city or country
the coldest season of the year

sentences.en: The host will prepare a pool for the teams to jump into after the fight.
sentences.zh: 主办方会准备一个水池，让队伍在战斗结束后跳进去。

words.eng_def: a person who has guests or an organization that has an event
to move your body into the air using your legs

sentences.en: Our coach says we must use a weapon during the battle, but it is a relatively safe tradition.
sentences.zh: 我们的教练说我们在战斗中必须使用武器，但这是一种相对安全的传统。

words.eng_def: a person who teaches a sport
a thing used to fight or hurt people
in a way that is compared to something else
a custom passed down over time

sentences.en: The actual spirit of the event is to award cash to the winner.
sentences.zh: 这个活动的真正精神是把现金奖励给获胜者。

words.eng_def: the part of a person that is not the body; the feeling of a group
to give something as a prize

sentences.en: I hardly have any cash, so I hope to win the prize.
sentences.zh: 我几乎没有现金，所以我希望能赢得奖金。

sentences.en: The coach helps us settle our plans and gives aid to every fan.
sentences.zh: 教练帮我们制定计划，并给每位粉丝提供帮助。

words.eng_def: a person who teaches a sport
a person who likes a sport or performer very much

sentences.en: A broad boat will carry us to the battle area.
sentences.zh: 一艘宽大的船将载我们去战斗区域。

words.eng_def: a small vehicle for traveling on water

sentences.en: After the lunch break, we will tire ourselves in the spring pool.
sentences.zh: 午休后，我们会在温泉池里让自己疲惫。

words.eng_def: a meal eaten in the middle of the day
to make someone feel they need to rest
a place where water comes out of the ground

sentences.en: The award ceremony has a tradition of giving a special prize to the best fighter.
sentences.zh: 颁奖典礼有一个传统，就是给最佳斗士颁发特别奖。

words.eng_def: a prize given for doing something well
a custom passed down over time

sentences.en: I will jump with joy if my team wins the battle.
sentences.zh: 如果我的队伍赢了战斗，我会高兴得跳起来。

words.eng_def: to move your body into the air using your legs

vocabulary.eng_def: the part of a person that is not the body; the feeling of a group

real, not false

vocabulary.eng_def: a fight between groups

quiz.question_cn: 哪个词的意思是“几乎不”？

quiz.question_en: Which word means 'a custom passed down over time'?
Which word means 'a thing used to fight or hurt people'?
Which word means 'to move your body into the air using your legs'?

image_prompts: A map of a district with a big sign saying 'Winter Battle This Year'
A large pool with water, and a person wearing a host badge pointing at it
A coach holding a wooden weapon and talking to a team, with a banner about tradition
A trophy and a pile of cash on a table, with a glowing spirit above them
A person with empty pockets looking sadly at a cash prize
A coach helping a group of fans with a paper plan
A wide boat on a river, carrying people to a distant battle area
People eating lunch at a table, then going to a hot spring pool
A ceremony stage with a person receiving a special prize from an award giver
A person jumping high in the air with joy, while a team celebrates a victory
